text:
You live in Rome. It’s hot. You spend a lazy afternoon in your little garden enjoying your salad. Suddenly the birds stop singing. A police car pulls up. A policeman steps out. You glance nervously at him. He smiles at you. He speaks perfect Italian. He speaks English. He motions for silence. He gestures toward a large blackened bird. You understand. You shrivel a bit. You thank him politely. You go inside. You have your salad again.
Then something strange happens. Just as you finish your dinner you see the bird again. It looks angry. It attacks you. You dodge. You leap through a cherry blossom. You disappear. The bird flies past. You laugh. You live on.
